description: Engajamento — cliques, scrolls, hovers, exposicoes, toques. Bucket __BUCKET__. Read-only para Viewers.

links.title: Configurações
links.tooltip: Trocar email/senha, publishable key, plano, consumo

targets.query:
from(bucket: "__BUCKET__")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site_id == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics" and r._field == "cliques")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device_type != "bot")
  |> group()
  |> sum()

panels.title: Scrolls (24h)
panels.description: Eventos scroll_depth — tipicamente o SDK manda 1 por marco de profundidade (25/50/75/100%).

targets.query:
from(bucket: "__BUCKET__")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site_id == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics" and r._field == "scrolls")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device_type != "bot")
  |> group()
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "__BUCKET__")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site_id == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics" and r._field == "hovers")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device_type != "bot")
  |> group()
  |> sum()

panels.title: Exposicoes (24h)
panels.description: element_exposure: elementos que entraram no viewport. Bom proxy de impressao.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "__BUCKET__")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site_id == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics" and r._field == "exposicoes")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device_type != "bot")
  |> group()
  |> sum()

panels.title: Toques mobile (24h)
panels.description: Eventos touch — mobile/tablet. Em desktop deve ser 0.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "__BUCKET__")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site_id == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics" and r._field == "toques")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device_type != "bot")
  |> group()
  |> sum()

panels.title: Cliques timeline por page_type
panels.description: Soma de cliques por page_type em janelas auto-escala.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "__BUCKET__")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site_id == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics" and r._field == "cliques")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device_type != "bot")
  |> group(columns: ["page_type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Engajamento por device_type (24h)
panels.description: Cliques + hovers + scrolls + toques agrupados por device_type. Mostra de onde vem o engajamento.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "__BUCKET__")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site_id == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "cliques" or r._field == "hovers" or r._field == "scrolls" or r._field == "toques")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device_type != "bot")
  |> group(columns: ["device_type"])
  |> sum()

panels.title: Top 10 paginas mais engajadas (cliques + scrolls + hovers, 24h)
panels.description: Combina cliques, scrolls e hovers como score de engajamento por pagina.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "__BUCKET__")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site_id == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "cliques" or r._field == "scrolls" or r._field == "hovers")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device_type != "bot")
  |> group(columns: ["page_type"])
  |> sum()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 10)

panels.title: Permanencia media na pagina (24h)
panels.description: Soma de permanencia_segundos por page_type. Cada batch contribui ~5s, entao isto eh tempo total agregado de TODAS as sessoes na pagina.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "__BUCKET__")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site_id == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics" and r._field == "permanencia_segundos")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device_type != "bot")
  |> group(columns: ["page_type"])
  |> sum()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 10)

title: Engajamento
